title: rubus moluccanus var. alceifolius
intro: Rubus moluccanus var. alceifolius, also known as the Moluccan raspberry or Raspberry Leaf, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds. The leaves and stems of this plant are reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Rubus moluccanus var. alceifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures.
